// reserved\n  header.writeUInt16LE\\(1, 2\\); // type: 1 = ICO\n  header.writeUInt16LE\\(count, 4\\);\n\n  const dirEntrySize = 16;\n  const dirSize = count * dirEntrySize;\n  const dataOffset = 6 + dirSize;\n\n  const entries = [];\n  let currentOffset = dataOffset;\n  for \\(const { data, width, height } of pngs\\) {\n    const entry = Buffer.alloc\\(dirEntrySize\\);\n    entry.writeUInt8\\(width === 256 ? 0 : width, 0\\);  // width \\(0 = 256\\)\n    entry.writeUInt8\\(height === 256 ? 0 : height, 1\\); // height\n    entry.writeUInt8\\(0, 2\\); // color count\n    entry.writeUInt8\\(0, 3\\); // reserved\n    entry.writeUInt16LE\\(1, 4\\); // color planes\n    entry.writeUInt16LE\\(32, 6\\); // bits per pixel\n    entry.writeUInt32LE\\(data.length, 8\\);\n    entry.writeUInt32LE\\(currentOffset, 12\\);\n    entries.push\\(entry\\);\n    currentOffset += data.length;\n  }\n\n  return Buffer.concat\\([header, ...entries, ...pngs.map\\(p => p.data\\)]\\);\n}\n\nconst sizes = [16, 32, 48];\nconst pngs = sizes.map\\(s => \\({\n  width: s,\n  height: s,\n  data: fs.readFileSync\\('public/favicon-' + \\(s === 48 ? '48x48' : s + 'x' + s\\) + '.png'\\)\n}\\)\\);\n\n// Fix: use proper file names\nconst pngsFixed = [\n  { width: 16, height: 16, data: fs.readFileSync\\('public/favicon-16x16.png'\\) },\n  { width: 32, height: 32, data: fs.readFileSync\\('public/favicon-32x32.png'\\) },\n  { width: 48, height: 48, data: fs.readFileSync\\('public/favicon-48x48.png'\\) },\n];\n\nconst ico = buildIco\\(pngsFixed\\);\nfs.writeFileSync\\('app/favicon.ico', ico\\);\nconsole.log\\('favicon.ico written:', ico.length, 'bytes'\\);\n\")","Bash(git add app/favicon.ico app/layout.tsx // reserved\n  header.writeUInt16LE\\(1, 2\\); // type: 1 = ICO\n  header.writeUInt16LE\\(count, 4\\);\n\n  const dirEntrySize = 16;\n  const dirSize = count * dirEntrySize;\n  const dataOffset = 6 + dirSize;\n\n  const entries = [];\n  let currentOffset = dataOffset;\n  for \\(const { data, width, height } of pngs\\) {\n    const entry = Buffer.alloc\\(dirEntrySize\\);\n    entry.writeUInt8\\(width === 256 ? 0 : width, 0\\);  // width \\(0 = 256\\)\n    entry.writeUInt8\\(height === 256 ? 0 : height, 1\\); // height\n    entry.writeUInt8\\(0, 2\\); // color count\n    entry.writeUInt8\\(0, 3\\); // reserved\n    entry.writeUInt16LE\\(1, 4\\); // color planes\n    entry.writeUInt16LE\\(32, 6\\); // bits per pixel\n    entry.writeUInt32LE\\(data.length, 8\\);\n    entry.writeUInt32LE\\(currentOffset, 12\\);\n    entries.push\\(entry\\);\n    currentOffset += data.length;\n  }\n\n  return Buffer.concat\\([header, ...entries, ...pngs.map\\(p => p.data\\)]\\);\n}\n\nconst sizes = [16, 32, 48];\nconst pngs = sizes.map\\(s => \\({\n  width: s,\n  height: s,\n  data: fs.readFileSync\\('public/favicon-' + \\(s === 48 ? '48x48' : s + 'x' + s\\) + '.png'\\)\n}\\)\\);\n\n// Fix: use proper file names\nconst pngsFixed = [\n  { width: 16, height: 16, data: fs.readFileSync\\('public/favicon-16x16.png'\\) },\n  { width: 32, height: 32, data: fs.readFileSync\\('public/favicon-32x32.png'\\) },\n  { width: 48, height: 48, data: fs.readFileSync\\('public/favicon-48x48.png'\\) },\n];\n\nconst ico = buildIco\\(pngsFixed\\);\nfs.writeFileSync\\('app/favicon.ico', ico\\);\nconsole.log\\('favicon.ico written:', ico.length, 'bytes'\\);\n\")","Bash(git add app/favicon.ico app/layout.tsx
